channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [MAHSEAMLES] Maharashtra Seamless Ltd Receives Moderate ESG Rating of 56 from NSE Sustainability
item.description:
Maharashtra Seamless Ltd has been assigned an Environmental, Social and Governance (ESG) score of '56' with a rating category of 'Moderate' by NSE Sustainability Ratings and Analytics Limited. The rating is based on publicly available data, and the company did not engage NSE Sustainability for this rating. The report has been prepared independently using information from the public domain. This disclosure is made as per Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, and SEBI Master Circular No. HO/49/14/14(7)2025-CFD POD2/I/3762/2026 dated 30th January, 2026.

  • Maharashtra Seamless Ltd receives ESG score of 56 from NSE Sustainability
  • Rating category is 'Moderate'
  • Rating is based on publicly available data
  • Company did not engage NSE Sustainability for the rating
  • Disclosure made as per SEBI regulations and master circular

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MAHARASHTRA SEAMLESS LTD. | Category: Transmission of Shares

item.title: [TRITONV] Triton Valves Ltd Secures 7-Year Contract from German Tech Firm Aumovio, Boosting Profitability and Cash Flow
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Triton Valves Ltd has signed a 7-year contract with Aumovio Germany GmbH, a German-based independent automotive technology company, for the supply of TPMS Valves. The contract, which is set to begin in the third quarter of the 2027-28 financial year, has the potential to significantly improve the company's profitability and cash flow. The contract also highlights the company's technical and commercial strength, as its product meets the standards of an international customer.

  • 7-year contract with Aumovio Germany GmbH
  • Potential sales during the contract period detailed in Annexure-A
  • Improvement in company's profitability and cash flow
  • Product meets the standards of an international customer
  • Highlights technical and commercial strength of the company

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TRITON VALVES LTD. | Category: Deals

item.title: [HDFCBANK] HDFC Bank's Q1 Advances and Deposits Grow by Around 10% and 14% Respectively Over Previous Year
item.description:
HDFC Bank Ltd. has reported a growth of around 10.0% in its average advances under management for the March 2026 quarter, reaching ₹ 29,644 billion. The period end advances under management were approximately ₹ 30,575 billion, a growth of around 10.2% over the same period last year. The Bank's average deposits were ₹ 28,511 billion, a growth of around 12.8% over the corresponding period. The period end deposits were approximately ₹ 31,055 billion, a growth of around 14.4% over the previous year. The results of the Bank as of March 31, 2026, will be subjected to an audit by the statutory auditors.

  • HDFC Bank's average advances under management for Q1 FY26 grew by around 10.0% to ₹ 29,644 billion.
  • The period end advances under management as of March 31, 2026, were approximately ₹ 30,575 billion, a growth of around 10.2%.
  • The Bank's average deposits for Q1 FY26 were ₹ 28,511 billion, a growth of around 12.8% over the corresponding period.
  • The period end deposits as of March 31, 2026, were approximately ₹ 31,055 billion, a growth of around 14.4%.
  • The Bank's results as of March 31, 2026, will be subjected to an audit by the statutory auditors.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HDFC Bank Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [ONGC] ONGC Stabilises Fire Incident at SHP Platform, Mumbai High, Minimal Injuries Reported
item.description:
A fire incident occurred at 17:45 PM on 3 April 2026 at ONGC’s SHP Platform, Mumbai High Asset. The situation was promptly controlled and the fire extinguished. Ten personnel sustained minor injuries and are under medical care, with all reported to be stable. Operations have been normalized.

  • Fire incident at ONGC’s SHP Platform, Mumbai High Asset reported on 3 April 2026
  • Situation promptly controlled and fire extinguished
  • 10 personnel sustained minor injuries, all reported to be stable
  • Injured personnel receiving medical care
  • Operations have been normalized

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Oil and Natural Gas Corporation Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [WELENT] Welspun Enterprises Subsidiary Receives Income Tax Demand Notice for FY 2023-24
item.description:
Welspun Enterprises Ltd. has informed that its subsidiary, Welspun Aunta-Simaria Project Private Limited, received a Notice of Demand under Section 156 of the Income Tax Act, 1961, pursuant to an Assessment Order passed by the Assessment Unit, National Faceless Assessment Centre, Income-tax Department. The demand pertains to the FY 2023-24 (AY: 2024-25) and is based on the Income-tax Assessment Order received upon conclusion of the Scrutiny assessment proceedings under Section 143(3) r.w.s 144B for the AY 2024-25. The Company believes that the accounting treatment adopted is appropriate and in compliance with the applicable framework for Hybrid Annuity Model (HAM) projects. The Company is taking appropriate steps to file an appeal before the Commissioner of Income-tax (Appeals) Tribunal against the Order issued by AO and does not foresee any material impact on financial, operational or other activities of the Company.

  • Welspun Enterprises subsidiary received a Notice of Demand under Section 156 of the Income Tax Act, 1961
  • The demand pertains to the FY 2023-24 (AY: 2024-25) and is based on the Income-tax Assessment Order for AY 2024-25
  • The dispute is related to the computation of income under ICDS III read with Section 43CB of the Income-tax Act, 1961
  • The Company believes the accounting treatment is appropriate and in compliance with the applicable framework
  • Welspun Enterprises to file an appeal before the Commissioner of Income-tax (Appeals) Tribunal against the Order issued by AO

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Welspun Enterprises Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [SHRIPISTON] Shriram Pistons & Rings Ltd: Kolbenschmidt Pistons Germany GmbH Carves Out Central Functions, Transfers Licence Agreements to New Entity
item.description:
Shriram Pistons & Rings Ltd announced that their technical collaborator, Kolbenschmidt Pistons Germany GmbH, has undergone a strategic realignment. Central functions have been carved out and transferred to a new entity, Kolbenschmidt Pistons Management GmbH. The existing licence agreements between Shriram Pistons & Rings Ltd and Kolbenschmidt Pistons Germany GmbH have been transferred to the new entity via assignment/assumption of contract. The Company confirmed that the scope of services, commercial terms, and operational points remain unchanged. The new entity has assumed all rights and obligations under the agreements, and there is no change in the terms and conditions of the licence agreements.

  • Kolbenschmidt Pistons Germany GmbH has undertaken a strategic realignment, carving out certain central functions and transferring them to a new entity, Kolbenschmidt Pistons Management GmbH.
  • Existing licence agreements between Shriram Pistons & Rings Ltd and Kolbenschmidt Pistons Germany GmbH have been transferred to Kolbenschmidt Pistons Management GmbH via assignment/assumption of contract.
  • The new entity, Kolbenschmidt Pistons Management GmbH, has assumed all rights and obligations under the agreements.
  • The scope of services, commercial terms, and operational points remain unchanged in the new licence agreements.
  • This strategic realignment is expected to strengthen Shriram Pistons & Rings Ltd's presence in the domestic market and secure new business opportunities with access to advanced technology.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Shriram Pistons & Rings Ltd | Category: Joint Ventures

item.title: [UNOMINDA] Uno Minda Ltd Faces Penalty Order for Excess Claim of Input Tax Credit
item.description:
Uno Minda Limited has received an order from ETO-cum-Proper Officer (GST), Ward 11, Gurugram (West), Haryana, India regarding excess claim of Input Tax Credit for the tax period 2019-20. The Company has been directed to pay the amount of Rs. 16,09,621 as tax, Rs. 16,09,621 as penalty, and Rs. 18,69,365 as interest. The order was received on April 03, 2026. The Company intends to contest against the said order and does not anticipate any material impact on its financial, operational, or other activities.

  • Uno Minda Ltd has received a penalty order for excess claim of Input Tax Credit
  • The Company has been directed to pay tax, penalty, and interest amounting to approximately Rs. 51 lakhs
  • The order was received on April 03, 2026
  • The Company plans to contest the order
  • Uno Minda Ltd does not anticipate any material impact on its financial, operational, or other activities

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: UNO Minda Ltd-$ | Category: Legal

item.title: [SHRIPISTON] Shriram Pistons & Rings Ltd Extends Technical Collaboration Agreement with Fuji OOZX INC. for Five More Years
item.description:
Shriram Pistons & Rings Ltd has executed a revised Technical Collaboration Agreement with Fuji OOZX INC. (Japan) on April 3, 2026. The agreement, which has been in place for over three decades, has been extended for a further period of five years to meet evolving customer requirements. Royalty will be payable to Fuji in accordance with the provisions of the amended agreement. The agreement allows the Company to continue manufacturing engine valves in India for both domestic and export markets, utilizing the latest technology and know-how from Fuji.

  • Shriram Pistons & Rings Ltd extends Technical Collaboration Agreement with Fuji OOZX INC. for five more years.
  • The agreement, in place for over three decades, represents an ongoing collaboration for the manufacture of engine valves.
  • The Company will continue to provide cutting-edge technology in India that is at par with the latest global standards.
  • Royalty will be payable to Fuji in accordance with the provisions of the amended agreement.
  • The agreement allows the Company to continue manufacturing engine valves in India for both domestic and export markets.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Shriram Pistons & Rings Ltd | Category: Joint Ventures

item.title: [SWSOLAR] Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy Subsidiary Settles Arbitration Case, Pays Conti, LLC, USA
item.description:
Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy Ltd. announced that its wholly owned step-down subsidiary, Sterling and Wilson Solar Solutions Inc., has made all the payments to Conti, LLC, USA as awarded by the Arbitration Tribunal. This concludes the litigation/arbitration. The details of this settlement are provided in accordance with the SEBI Circular No. HO/49/14/14(7)2025-CFD- POD2/I/3762/2026 dated January 30, 2026.

  • Sterling and Wilson Solar Solutions Inc. has made all payments to Conti, LLC, USA as awarded by the Arbitration Tribunal.
  • This settlement concludes the litigation/arbitration for Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy Ltd.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Sterling and Wilson Renewable Energy Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [SABTN] Aqylon Nexus Ltd to Approve Audited Financial Results for Q1 2026 on April 8, 2026
item.description:
Aqylon Nexus Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will meet on April 8, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window for dealing in securities of the company will be closed for all insiders, designated persons, and their immediate relatives from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after the declaration of the audited financial results.

  • Aqylon Nexus Ltd to consider and approve audited financial results for Q1 2026
  • Board meeting scheduled for April 8, 2026
  • Trading window closure for insiders, designated persons, and their immediate relatives from April 1, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SRI ADHIKARI BROTHERS TELEVISION NETWORK LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result
